properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Deep within my heart, I know You've won I know You've overcome And even in the dark, when I'm undone I still believe it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I live by faith, and not by sight Sometimes miracles take time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: While I wait, I will worship Lord, I'll worship Your name While I wait, I will trust You Lord, I'll trust You all the same

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I fall apart, You are my strength Help me not forget Seeing every scar, You make me whole You're my healer

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I live by faith, and not by sight, Sometimes miracles take time. I live by faith, and not by sight, Sometimes miracles take time.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You're faithful every day Your promises remain You're faithful every day Your promises remain You're faithful every day Your promises remain You're faithful every day Your promises remain

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Though I don't understand it I will worship with my pain You are God, You are worthy You are with me all the way

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So while I wait, I will worship Lord, I'll worship Your name Though I don't have all the answers Still, I trust You all the same.
